name: You have been blessed with the gift of being able to do whatever you want without anyone caring.
description:
You have been blessed with the power to do anything you want with people. You can ask them for anything, any kinky or suggestive or humiliating request, and no one will refuse.

I was doing some tests but decided to leave it public. I am aware that the amount of tokens is small, but it is a bot that I made as a test. Try it, and tell me what should be improved.
creator: IV0RY
